arts.ttl: From Spain: Real Madrid want Liverpool negotiations to get Trent for Club World Cup… but he’s not even a guaranteed starter
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold is set to join Real Madrid in the summer window. His contract expires in June and he has an agreement in place with Real Madrid to join them for free. The Liverpool star is on the front page of today’s AS, with ‘signing with unknowns’ written in bold. Within the report, it’s explained The post From Spain: Real Madrid want Liverpool negotiations to get Trent for Club World Cup… but he’s not even a guaranteed starter appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man City could use 'Claudio Echeverri card' to beat Real Madrid, PSG to £41.6m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City could use teenage midfield talent Claudio Echeverri as a bargaining chip in their pursuit of Lazio defender Mario Gila, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid quartet probed for alleged indecent conduct
arts.sum: Uefa has opened an investigation into allegations of indecent conduct by four Real Madrid players during their Champions League last-16 win against Atletico Madrid.

Real Madrid are now three points behind first-placed Barcelona in La Liga after the latter picked up an important victory on Thursday. Carlo Ancelotti's side are chasing a treble at the moment, and th...

arts.ttl: Mbappe v Mbappe! Real Madrid star meets waxwork double
arts.sum: It was double Kylian Mbappe at Madame Tussauds as the Real Madrid and France star sees his waxwork figurine for the first time.

arts.ttl: Hamza Igamane catches Real Madrid eyes as Morocco moment sparks clamour for Rangers star with 'bright future'
arts.sum: The frontman made his international debut and impressed his boss and teammates during the World Cup camp

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid see £72 million Chelsea star as their back up plan
arts.sum: Real Madrid are looking to sign a new goalkeeper in the summer transfer window and they are eyeing a move for a Chelsea player. The Spanish giants could lose one of their goalkeepers after this season and they are ready to explore a move for a Premier League goalkeeper who has played for them in […] The post Report: Real Madrid see £72 million Chelsea star as their back up plan appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: The Transfers Podcast: Real Madrid Rodrygo SALE, Vini Jr WAR with Mbappe, Gyokeres REJECTS Man Utd
arts.sum: “He wants to go to a club where he can prove himself, where he can win trophies, and his assessment of where Manchester United are at the moment is that is not the option to take in a summer where he'll be turning 27,” Castles said on the latest episode of The Transfers Podcast. Real Madrid are ‘ready to call Vinicius Junior’s bluff’ in contract talks and would be open to selling him to the Saudi Pro League this summer, The Transfers Podcast understands.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold's Real Madrid switch leads to 'serious doubts' over stalwart's Bernabeu future
arts.sum: Real Madrid stalwart Lucas Vazquez is reportedly heading towards the exit door following the news that Trent Alexander-Arnold will be heading to the Spanish capital this summer.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher reveals what he can't understand about Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's future at Liverpool looks set to be drawing to a close, with the England international appearing set to join Jude Bellingham at Real Madrid
